creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 198044
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.4.3

Patch updating net-mgmt/prometheus2 to 2.4.3

Changelog from https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/tag/v2.4.3:

    [BUGFIX] Fix panic when using custom EC2 API for SD
    [BUGFIX] Fix panic when Zookeeper SD cannot connect to servers
    [BUGFIX] Make the skip_head an optional parameter for snapshot API
